brief_notes: Comprehensive methods paper covering algorithm design, large-scale benchmarking (366 maps), and multiple case studies. The mathematical formulation is clear and the EM algorithm framework is well-motivated. Tables effectively catalog datasets, metrics, and comparisons. Weaknesses include benchmark tables that use qualitative descriptors rather than actual CCC values, and the ensemble size analysis lacks specific numbers. The Discussion appropriately positions the work relative to existing tools. Good breadth of validation across different applications (segmentation, composite maps, AlphaFold integration).
